title: Effective Address Calculation
description: Calculate the final value in rbx after memory-style arithmetic.

questions.question: What is the final integer value in rbx?

answer.explanation: The LEA (Load Effective Address) instruction performs the calculation: rax + (rcx * 4) + 7. Substituting the values: 10 + (5 * 4) + 7 = 10 + 20 + 7 = 37.
